title: Weekly parameter auto-optimization using AI — results after 3 months
author: Calm-Statistician312
selftext:
We built a system that analyzes bot performance weekly

and auto-adjusts parameters (SL multiplier, TP multiplier,

session filters, min confluence score).

Process:

1. Collect all trades from the past 30 days

2. Analyze: win rate by session, drawdown patterns, spread at entry

3. AI suggests parameter changes with justification

4. Backtest proposed changes on 90 days of data

5. Apply ONLY if win rate improves by ≥1.5%

Example: Our gold scalper (XAU/USD M15) was losing 74% of trades

during Asian session (02-05 UTC). AI detected this, disabled

that session window, tightened SL from 3.0 to 2.8 ATR.

Result: win rate went from 65% → 68%.

The 1.5% threshold prevents overfitting — if the improvement

isn't statistically significant, parameters stay unchanged.

Anyone else doing automated parameter optimization?

What's your validation approach?
